heading: Omitted
label: 616aaa to 616fff–7 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 616aaa, , , , authorized construction, operation, and maintenance of the Auburn-Folsom South unit, American River division, Central Valley project, California, and described principal features of this unit.Pub. L. 89–161, § 179 Stat. 615Sept. 2, 1965Section 616bbb, , , , provided for financial and operational integration and coordination of this unit with Central Valley project.Pub. L. 89–161, § 279 Stat. 616Sept. 2, 1965Section 616ccc, , , , related to construction, operation, and maintenance of public recreational facilities and enhancement of fish and wildlife in connection with this unit.Pub. L. 89–161, § 379 Stat. 616Sept. 2, 1965Section 616ddd, , , , provided that in locating and designating works and facilities of this unit consideration be given to State of California water plan reports and that local interests be consulted.Pub. L. 89–161, § 479 Stat. 618Sept. 2, 1965Section 616eee, , , , related to allocation of water.Pub. L. 89–161, § 579 Stat. 618Sept. 2, 1965Section 616fff, , , , authorized appropriations for this unit.Pub. L. 89–161, § 679 Stat. 618Sept. 2, 1965Section 616fff–1, , , , authorized construction, operation, and maintenance of San Felipe division, Central Valley project, California.Pub. L. 90–72, § 181 Stat. 173Aug. 27, 1967Section 616fff–2, , , , related to conservation and development of fish and wildlife and enhancement of recreational facilities in connection with this division.Pub. L. 90–72, § 281 Stat. 174Aug. 27, 1967Section 616fff–3, , , , related to contracts for delivery of water through State facilities.Pub. L. 90–72, § 381 Stat. 174Aug. 27, 1967Section 616fff–4, , , , provided that in locating and designing works and facilities of this division consideration be given to State of California water plan reports and that local interests be consulted.Pub. L. 90–72, § 481 Stat. 174Aug. 27, 1967Section 616fff–5, , , , related to nonapplicability of other laws to this division.Pub. L. 90–72, § 581 Stat. 174Aug. 27, 1967Section 616fff–6, , , , related to restriction on delivery of water for production of excessive basic commodities.Pub. L. 90–72, § 681 Stat. 174Aug. 27, 1967Section 616fff–7, , , , authorized appropriations for this division.Pub. L. 90–72, § 781 Stat. 174Aug. 27, 1967
